title: lepisorus asterolepis
intro: Lepisorus asterolepis, also known as the Chinese ladder fern or ladder fern, is a species of plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Lepisorus asterolepis is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be dried and made into a powder for use in teas and capsules.
